summary: Raw soundboard capture with energetic performance; standout Dark Star, Stella Blue and Sugar Magnolia
review: The recording is a raw, uncompressed sound‑board source that retains the “teeth” of a 1973 show, despite occasional vocal clipping and a mic‑cable wobble. Musically the concert is spirited and energized, with fans highlighting a smoking Dark Star into El Paso, a beautifully paced Eyes of the World, and emotive renditions of Stella Blue, Morning Dew and Sugar Magnolia.

ai_rating.rationale: Three consistent, mostly‑four‑plus star reviews praise the performance and note only minor recording quirks; weighted rating reflects strong show quality and decent soundboard capture.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Raw, uncompressed mix with plenty of “teeth”; occasional vocal clipping on Eyes of the World, mic‑cable noise, and a brief pause‑like glitch in Casey Jones, but overall clear and listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic and spirited set, with an unusual second‑set opener Around & Around; pacing praised especially on extended Dark Star > El Paso and the gently stretched Eyes of the World.
